name: Wavelength
short_description: Do you like music? Do you want to like your favorite music even more? Spend 5 minutes with Wavelength🏄‍♂️ and you will!
detailed_description:
Now in Public Beta!
Instructions for use:
  • Start playing some music.
  • Launch Wavelength🏄‍♂️
  • That’s all there is to it
Here's the Getting Started Guide:
Check out some Youtube videos to learn how to use it and other information:
With Wavelength, you can experience your music like you’ve never experienced it before. For all the endless customization options, just follow the menus on the screen, but for the newbies do this: Launch, Watch and Listen. Happy Surfing 🏄 the Wavelength!
